queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how savings account balances below 100 DM function as credit risk drivers that correlate with reduced default probability and enhanced borrower stability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Investigating the determinants of default associated with having no known savings account and their risk-mitigating effects in consumer lending portfolios.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Assessing the protective impact of checking account balances below 0 DM on the likelihood of loan default and credit risk deterioration.
